Back:
no entanto / porém

The plan was risky. However, it worked. {{audio}}

💡 No início da frase, seguido de vírgula.
Audio: The plan was risky. However, it worked.

Back:
embora / apesar de

Although it was raining, we went out. {{audio}}
Embora estivesse chovendo, saímos.
Audio: Although it was raining, we went out.

Back:
porque

I stayed home because I was tired. {{audio}}
Fiquei em casa porque estava cansado.
Audio: I stayed home because I was tired.

Back:
portanto / por isso

He studied hard. Therefore, he passed. {{audio}}
Ele estudou muito. Portanto, passou.
Audio: He studied hard. Therefore, he passed.
